description: Find the narrowest crossing point of the Dardanelles strait (Canakkale Strait) between latitudes 40.08°N and 40.25°N. Measure the strait width at that point in meters. Create a placemark named 'Bridge_Site_Recommendation' at the narrowest location with the measured width in the description (e.g., 'Width: 1250m'). Save to My Places.

metadata.data_source: Çanakkale 1915 Bridge engineering specifications, Turkish Maritime Authorities
